repo.description: A collection of crates for developing 3DS homebrew in Rust.

terms.context_snippet: This repository has been deprecated in favour of the new `ctru-rs` version of the Rust3DS toolchain. For more information about the new tools and libraries, check [ctru-rs](https://github.com/rust3ds/ctru-rs).
